title: Plugin/extension system
description: Distributable plugin system like Claude Code plugins / Pi-mono packages. Plugins can contribute: tools, hooks (pre/post tool), skills, providers. Distribution: git URL or local path. Install to ~/.ion/plugins/. Each plugin is a directory with manifest (ion-plugin.toml or similar). Phase 1: hooks system (pre/post tool execution callbacks). Phase 2: plugin loading + tool contribution. Phase 3: distribution/install.

logs.msg: Phase 1 (hooks) already complete: HookRegistry, CommandHook (shell), pre/post tool execution, config-driven via ion.toml [[hooks]] section. Remaining: Phase 2+ (distributable plugin packages, tool contribution, install system).
